programme.title: Hot Copy on Headstart with Karen Davila
Great Australian Walks - Snowies Alpine Walk
programme.desc: Gina Chick walks barefoot to the top of Mt Kosciuszko, the rooftop of Australia, and discovers the story of a Polish freedom fighter that the mountain was named after.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India - Episode 2
programme.desc: Jess and her riders face challenges heading to Kodaikanal, riding through rough terrain and making decisions on the fly. The gang is rewarded with an elephant sighting and a new addition to their ride crew in Munnar.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Episode 6
programme.desc: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 6
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 9
programme.desc: As Trump steamrolls through the second year of his second term, Chas and John are here each week to guide you through the mayhem - covering Iran, ICE, tariffs, NATO, Russia/Ukraine, Gaza, Greenland, the midterms and more.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 64
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice - Colin Lane
programme.desc: Comedian Colin Lane goes rogue in his quest to learn a simple Asian dish.

programme.title: Landline: Fiji Special - Fiji
programme.desc: In Fiji, Landline reports on the growth in beekeeping and the management of varroa mite, plus the surge in kava farming and new products for the export market.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 90
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 50
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 7
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India - Episode 2
programme.desc: Jess and her riders face challenges heading to Kodaikanal, riding through rough terrain and making decisions on the fly. The gang is rewarded with an elephant sighting and a new addition to their ride crew in Munnar.

programme.title: The World - Episode 50
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - Snowies Alpine Walk
programme.desc: Gina Chick walks barefoot to the top of Mt Kosciuszko, the rooftop of Australia, and discovers the story of a Polish freedom fighter that the mountain was named after.

programme.title: Save This Shark - Episode 2
programme.desc: Mick Fanning continues his mission by travelling to the world's shark hotspots, where he gets a closer look at the incredible apex predators.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Aussie Rules Football
programme.desc: Dr Karl unravels how leather, laces, and over a century of craft produce the sacred ball at the centrepiece of the nation's favourite game, Aussie Rules Football.

programme.title: ABC Late News - Episode 64
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow.

programme.title: The Business - Episode 34
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 50
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World - Episode 50
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: The Secret World Of Snakes (S1)
programme.desc: With unparalleled access to over 100 snake species across the globe, The Secret World of Snakes goes to the extreme to uncover their killer strategies and extraordinary abilities.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet (S4)
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff tackles surgery he's never done before to save a pit bull puppy who can't eat on his own. A young woman's cat is rushed to the clinic with a mysterious injury.

programme.title: Feeding Time (S1)
programme.desc: In some of the world's best zoo's, we meet some of the most amazing animals - in the UK we share lunch with the critically endangered Lemurs and Black Rhino.

programme.title: Strategy Of Life (S1)
programme.desc: The way animals mate is fascinating. The antechinus, an indigenous Australian marsupial, risks everything during a one-week period of mating, and eventually dies bravely.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell (S7)
programme.desc: Jackson deals with some of the worst cat on cat aggression and cat on human aggression he has ever seen. And he’s faced with some of the most outlandish behavior ever.

programme.title: Big Cat Tales (S2)
programme.desc: Clashing elephants force the Marsh pride to take cover. Fig the leopard continues to give vital lessons for young cub.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet (S4)
programme.desc: Dr. Baier treats a dog who has stopped eating. Dr. Amy tackles complex surgery to help a feisty cat. A Weimaraner needs an urgent procedure.

programme.title: Super Animals (S2)
programme.desc: Think transformations are only for fairy tales? Think again! In this episode, we'll reveal how animals such as the Grasshopper, Diving Bell Spider, Giant Panda, Atlas Moth, and more pull off such incredible transformations!

programme.title: Super Animals (S2)
programme.desc: Get dazzled by nature s beauty! From the Peacock s iridescent feathers to the Bengal Tiger s striking stripes and the Panther Chameleon s color-changing magic, prepare for a feast for the eyes!

programme.title: The Secret World Of Snakes (S1)
programme.desc: With unparalleled access to over 100 snake species across the globe, The Secret World of Snakes goes to the extreme to uncover their killer strategies and extraordinary abilities.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell (S7)
programme.desc: Jackson deals with some of the worst cat on cat aggression and cat on human aggression he has ever seen. And he’s faced with some of the most outlandish behavior ever.

programme.title: Strategy Of Life (S1)
programme.desc: The way animals mate is fascinating. The antechinus, an indigenous Australian marsupial, risks everything during a one-week period of mating, and eventually dies bravely.

programme.title: Just Animals (S3)
programme.desc: Renowned for their unique ability to inhabit both terrestrial and aquatic environments, amphibians derive their name from a Greek word meaning 'double life.'.

programme.title: Super Animals (S2)
programme.desc: Think transformations are only for fairy tales? Think again! In this episode, we'll reveal how animals such as the Grasshopper, Diving Bell Spider, Giant Panda, Atlas Moth, and more pull off such incredible transformations!

programme.title: Super Animals (S2)
programme.desc: Get dazzled by nature s beauty! From the Peacock s iridescent feathers to the Bengal Tiger s striking stripes and the Panther Chameleon s color-changing magic, prepare for a feast for the eyes!

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters (S1)
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate a terrifying underwater attack by a 6ft beast in a remote outback river.

programme.title: Parenthood (S1)
programme.desc: In the open grasslands of our planet, parents must constantly balance risk and reward when raising the next generation.

programme.title: Food Feud (S1)
programme.desc: In the heart of Katong Shopping Centre, two bakeries are locked in a battle over banana pie.

programme.title: French Gourmet With Justine Schofield (S1)
programme.desc: Justine visits the charming old town of Sarlat where she explores the vibrant local market.

programme.title: French Gourmet With Justine Schofield (S1)
programme.desc: In this final episode, Justine cooks up mussels at a breathtaking Chateau and visits the magical village of Brantome.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Jeremy hits the road and takes a trip to Whitstable where he finds out how oysters are farmed.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Jeremy's road trip takes him to Aberdeenshire where he meets Grace and her herd of Highland Cattle.

programme.title: Wonderful Indonesia Flavours (S2)
programme.desc: In this episode, Chefs Marinka and Tobie Puttock hold nothing back as they dive into the soul of Indonesia; Yogyakarta.

programme.title: Wonderful Indonesia Flavours (S2)
programme.desc: Also known as the Lands of the Gods, Bali takes the lead in organic food produce and clean eating.

programme.title: Makan On Wheels (S2)
programme.desc: Before heading to Temerloh, Pahang, the three hosts experience deep-sea fishing in Kuala Rompin.

programme.title: Beyond Bali: The World's Most Exotic Islands (S1)
programme.desc: In southern Lombok, Lara Lee finds soulful seafood, skilled craftswomen, and stunning coastlines on an island where tradition and regeneration are powerfully entwined.

programme.title: Discovering Local Ramen By Car (S1)
programme.desc: In Niigata, we started our trip from Murakami City in Kaetsu. We tried miso ramen and katsudon in Drive-in Fuji.

programme.title: Discovering Local Ramen By Car (S1)
programme.desc: Our journey in Niigata Prefecture continues to Sanjo City, known for its metal processing industry.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet (S11)
programme.desc: Develop your prowess in the kitchen with one of Australia's most recognisable culinary faces, Justine Schofield on Everyday Gourmet.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet (S11)
programme.desc: Develop your prowess in the kitchen with one of Australia's most recognisable culinary faces, Justine Schofield on Everyday Gourmet.

programme.title: Travel With Mommy (S1)
programme.desc: Join Jason, Jack \u0026 their mothers as they seek out Singapore's gems - from luxurious boutique hotels, cultural museums \u0026 Jurong Bird Park.

programme.title: The Streets, Hong Kong (S1)
programme.desc: Dan Hong will explore every corner of Hong Kong, learning about its history and culture and how this has shaped the local food scene.

programme.title: The Streets, Hong Kong (S1)
programme.desc: Dan Hong will explore every corner of Hong Kong, learning about its history and culture and how this has shaped the local food scene.

programme.title: Wonderful Indonesia Flavours (S2)
programme.desc: With Mount Rinjani providing the scenic backdrop, Rinrin and Tobie uncover the culture and charm of the Sasak people.

programme.title: Wonderful Indonesia Flavours (S2)
programme.desc: In this episode, the duo go beyond the usual dishes to uncover mouth-watering offerings such as Gulai Ikan Karang (fish in yellow curry).

programme.title: Food Feud (S1)
programme.desc: Hainanese chicken rice, one of Singapore's national dishes, was popularized by the famous Swee Kee Chicken Rice at Middle Road in the 1950s and 1960s.

programme.title: Food Feud (S1)
programme.desc: Ji Xiang Confectionery is one of the oldest and most popular ang ku kueh sellers in Singapore,with faithful crowds thronging its Everton Park shop over the last 35 years.

programme.desc: Nomanbhoy \u0026 Son, a heritage brand, is committed to preserving Singapore's spice culture and supporting clove farmers in Africa.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 1
programme.desc: Lion numbers continue to grow, but there's not enough food to go around; a lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Ed \u0026 Ryu: Mad About Seafood 1
programme.desc: Chef Edward Lee and actor Ryu Sooyoung embark on a coastal journey to discover South Korea’s spring seafood traditions. From the hills of Namhae to the mudflats of Taean, the duo harvests fernbrake, digs for clams, and catches blue crabs.

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into Thailand with Sue Perkins 1
programme.desc: Episode one of Sue Perkins' Lost In Thailand opens in magnificent Northern Thailand where Sue explores the breath-taking beauty of the Thai Highlands.

programme.title: Dynasties 1
programme.desc: In Senegal, West Africa, live a group of chimpanzees, led by an alpha male named David. He has already been alpha for 3 years - a time when leaders here are usually overthrown. To make matters worse, David has no allies - no-one to help him defend his leadership.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 1
programme.desc: Lion numbers continue to grow, but there's not enough food to go around; a lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories 2
programme.desc: We open the doors to one of the world's most advanced electric taxis. How do American footballs withstand the equivalent force of 200 newtons? In France, a cosmetic line relies on high tech robotic automation and China continues to produce a childhood favourite in epic proportions.

programme.title: Ed \u0026 Ryu: Mad About Seafood 1
programme.desc: Chef Edward Lee and actor Ryu Sooyoung embark on a coastal journey to discover South Korea’s spring seafood traditions. From the hills of Namhae to the mudflats of Taean, the duo harvests fernbrake, digs for clams, and catches blue crabs.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends 1
programme.desc: Michael embraces the spirit of the great navigators, uncovers the origins of the spy with a license to kill, discovers a lavish 18th century party palace, and turns sleuth to find a secret restaurant.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 1
programme.desc: Lion numbers continue to grow, but there's not enough food to go around; a lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into Thailand with Sue Perkins 1
programme.desc: Episode one of Sue Perkins' Lost In Thailand opens in magnificent Northern Thailand where Sue explores the breath-taking beauty of the Thai Highlands.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends 1
programme.desc: Michael's tackles a 700-year old stick-fighting marital art, witnesses divine illumination at a magnificent monastery, and discovers a chocolate cake with global ambitions.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Trees 1
programme.desc: Discover how trees can extend their lives by 'walking' across the land and planting new roots, how they can 'learn' from trauma, and how a decaying tree has the miraculous ability to nurture new life.

programme.title: Extreme Treks 2
programme.desc: Ryan journeys deep into Peru along an ancient and remote footpath, where massive snow-capped mountains collide with lush tropical rain forests. The famous Salkantay Trek connects the city of Mollepata with Machu Picchu and passes Mount Salkantay, an outstanding glacier-capped summit.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle 10
programme.desc: Ben travels to Dorset to live for a week with Chris, a former paratrooper who has spent the last five years walking Britain's coastline, finding love and raising thousands for charity.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends 1
programme.desc: Michael's tackles a 700-year old stick-fighting marital art, witnesses divine illumination at a magnificent monastery, and discovers a chocolate cake with global ambitions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Asia
programme.desc: From Hong Kong, the most important global business and breaking markets news information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Middle East
programme.desc: From Dubai, connecting Asian markets to the European opens - this show focuses on global macro issues with a Middle Eastern context.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Europe
programme.desc: Anchored by Anna Edwards and Mark Cudmore, a fast-paced show of news and analysis, building towards the drama and excitement of the start of trading across the Continent.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: European Open
programme.desc: Kick-start the trading day with Francine Lacqua and Tom Mackenzie from London bringing you news that no investor in Europe can afford to miss.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance: Early Edition
programme.desc: With Anna Edwards, Matt Miller, and Kailey Leinz from London, Berlin and New York, bringing insight on markets and the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Open
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro hosts this programme showcasing the most insightful and informative Bloomberg charts to help position a global audience for the trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Americas
programme.desc: From New York, the most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: European Close
programme.desc: Analysing the major market moving stories across the day in Europe, hearing from the biggest newsmakers, and showcasing the unrivalled expertise of Bloomberg News.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: Bloomberg Markets is focused on bringing you the most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Health China
programme.desc: Using health to promote a happy and beautiful lifestyle in China, presenting the concept of holistic health.

programme.title: Treasures Found
programme.desc: Documentary about National Treasures.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen S24
programme.desc: The eight chefs compete in a communication relay challenge to make an elevated Chinese dish. Later, it’s the annual Charity night in Hell’s Kitchen as the chefs each take turns leading a course.

programme.title: Top Chef S23
programme.desc: Top Chef is a hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a fascinating window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery and the restaurant business at the highest level.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent S19
programme.desc: The nation's most beloved talent competition continues with a new set of thrilling acts performing for the judges and the golden opportunity to perform for the Royal Family.

programme.title: Ghosts S5
programme.desc: The story continues for Sam and Jay as they run their Woodstone B\u0026B and restaurant, navigate the ghosts' day-to-day antics, and deal with new life challenges.

programme.title: Matlock S2
programme.desc: Follow Madeline Matlock as she rejoins the work force at a prestigious law firm, where she uses her wily tactics to win cases and expose wrongdoing.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid S8
programme.desc: The $100,000 Pyramid Season 8 continues Michael Strahan's hosting, featuring celebrity pairs alongside contestants playing classic word-association rounds to reach the $100,000 Winner's Circle.

programme.title: Survivor S50
programme.desc: SURVIVOR 50 goes into uncharted territory and impact the players like never before. For the first time ever, the game is “In the Hands of the Fans”! The players won’t know what the fans voted for until they are competing on the island.

programme.title: Top Chef S23
programme.desc: Top Chef is a hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a fascinating window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery and the restaurant business at the highest level.

programme.title: Ghosts S5
programme.desc: The story continues for Sam and Jay as they run their Woodstone B\u0026B and restaurant, navigate the ghosts' day-to-day antics, and deal with new life challenges.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen S24
programme.desc: The seven remaining chefs fight for black jackets. For the first time in Hell’s Kitchen history, the top five is all female.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: As Beverly (Wendi McLendon-Covey) tries to find Adam some lunchtime friends, the Goldbergs’ new answering machine launches a war between Murray (Jeff Garlin) and his father, Pop-Pop (Judd Hirsch).

programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: Mickey Fox, a sheriff in Edgewater and stepsister of Cal Fire’s division chief Sharon Leone, must balance the demands of law enforcement with the complexities of motherhood, politics and a past that won’t stay buried.

programme.title: Fire Country S4
programme.desc: Bode Leone works alongside elite firefighters from Cal Fire and former friends, battling large-scale wildfires while navigating his complex past and personal relationships.
Crashed on an unknown planet, a pilot faces prehistoric creatures in an epic fight to survive.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: D' Anothers
programme.desc: Hesus Resurreccion, a total scaredy cat who lives with his social-climbing aunt and two rowdy cousins, inherits an abandoned mansion. Coincidentally, the said location serves as a portal to the afterlife for the stranded ghosts, and they know that Hesus is \"The One\" who would open it. If he didn't, the ghosts would turn into cockroaches.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: Corazon (Boots Anson Roa), an old Filipina who lives in Boston, wrote to each Manuel Pineda in her home a letter. She hopes to find her love again. In the Philippines experiences of the old Manuel Pineda (Eddie Garcia), meanwhile, that he has cancer and has only months to live. He goes in search of his Corazon.There were two Corazons in his life: before the Second World War, he spent (Mark Herras) and his buddy Domingo (Polo Ravales) a lot of time with the shy \"Cora\" (Jennylyn Mercado) and the lively \" Azon \"(Pauline Luna).

programme.title: My Amnesia Girl
programme.desc: With his friends all settling down, a young man decides that it's time for him to pursue his true love. As fate would have it, he runs into an ex-girlfriend that he never got over. The catch: the girl has suffered a bout of amnesia, and has no recollection of their relationship.

programme.title: Mano Po 6: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: A half-Chinese, half-Filipino mother who's struggled most of her life to be accepted by her husband's family tries to reconnect with a daughter she left in the care of her sister-in-law. But the daughter believes she was abandoned, and the sister-in-law has kept a grudge against her, making things a lot more complicated.

programme.title: Last Fool Show
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a woman who turns to her ex for inspiration for a movie she's writing.

programme.title: Kung Fu Divas
programme.desc: Beauty pageant rivals become reluctant allies when a sudden threat puts the lives of the people in their community in danger.

programme.title: Love Me Tomorrow
programme.desc: A journey of a young man named JC, a conflicted young woman Janine, and Christy a woman on the verge of renaissance.

programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington and conservationist Paul de Gelder track deadly tiger sharks in one of Brazil's most beautiful tourist destinations.

programme.desc: The adventure heats up as teams are formed and the queens set out on a challenging trek through the jungle towards their new camps.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid (S6)
programme.desc: A musician and a college student want an off-the-grid treehouse compound in the Arkansas woods. Water and supply issues make this a tough project to complete.

programme.title: In The Eye Of The Storm (S2)
programme.desc: In 2024, Florida is pounded by two huge back-to-back deadly hurricanes. Helene and Milton wreak havoc with storm surges and dozens of tornadoes.

programme.title: Exploring The Unknown With Wang Yibo (S1)
programme.desc: Wang Yibo challenges himself to free dive in the ocean and use photography to record fluorescent corals during night dives.

programme.title: Marooned With Ed Stafford (S3)
programme.desc: Barefoot among the karst spires of Guangxi China, Ed must learn to navigate the razor-sharp rocks and deadly snakes in this scarce environment.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue (S7)
programme.desc: In Wyoming's Black Hills, Marty's back to help the Black family after their success is threatened by huge issues and intensifying bad weather.

programme.title: Reality Ranis Of The Jungle (S1)
programme.desc: In this intense episode, two friends face off in the season's first survival challenge, testing their individual skills and resolve.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S3)
programme.desc: Marooned on the banks of the might Amazon River, Joe and Cody show how to stay alive on the world's dealiest river.

programme.title: In The Eye Of The Storm (S2)
programme.desc: Hurricane Helene barrels north, causing massive flooding in Appalachia. As the deluge sweeps away one woman, a man jumps into the water to save her.

programme.title: Exploring The Unknown With Wang Yibo (S1)
programme.desc: On a perilous cliff in Yangshuo, China's climbing paradise, Wang Yibo takes on his toughest challenge yet: opening a new climbing route.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid (S6)
programme.desc: A family try to build a silo greenhouse home in the Blue Ridge Mountains of Georgia. This unique build is made even more challenging by unpredictable weather.

programme.title: Reality Ranis Of The Jungle (S1)
programme.desc: The ultimate showdown begins as the final three Ranis face the final survival challenge.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: Attenborough's Life In Colour
programme.desc: Millions of years ago, the first animals had eyes that were unable to distinguish color -- yet as that changed, ‘seeing in color’ gave animals many advantages, whether to find food, attract a mate or warn off an enemy.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life In Colour
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals some of the natural world’s most cunning tricksters and masters of disguise. Discover how some animals use color to hide and disappear into the background, or to trick and deceive.

programme.title: Attenborough's Life In Colour
programme.desc: Find out the stories behind the scientific research on animal colors - from robotic frogs wrestling with real-life counterparts, to spiders wearing eyeliner to attract mates.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s first stop on his food trail of South Africa is the bustling city of Cape Town. Here, he visits a lively farmers market and cooks up a Cape Malay Curry in Bo Kaap.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren continues his food trail along South Africa’s Cape Coast, stopping off at the township of Khayelitsha, home to some inspiring micro-farming initiatives, before arriving at Grootbos Private Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the Cape Winelands, where he tastes a variety of local wines including Pinotage, a signature South African red, and Ratafia, a unique and complex fortified wine.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Tswalu Nature Reserve, in the heart of the Kalahari Desert. Warren then meets with acclaimed Chef Marnus to cook up some exciting South African delicacies.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the coastal city of Durban - where he’s staying at the iconic Oyster Box hotel.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: In Durban, Warren visits the famous restaurant Max’s Lifestyle for an indulgent Shisa Nyama experience, before meeting with local guide Thoko to visit a nearby Zulu village.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao: Unstoppable Force
programme.desc: This is the remarkable journey of one of boxing’s most unstoppable forces. Manny Pacquiao’s legacy will forever be remembered for the change accomplished inside and outside the ring….

programme.title: Michael J. Fox: Actor, Activist, Optimist
programme.desc: Michael J. Fox's life, from his rise to fame to a Parkinson's diagnosis at 29, has been nothing short of a real-life movie, marked by unexpected twists and remarkable resilience.

programme.title: Robert Downey Jr: High Altitude
programme.desc: When we think of a prolific, yet tumultuous career in Hollywood… A name stands out amongst the crowd. From his hardships to his incredible retribution… This is Robert Downey Jr.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: From their teeth, and claws, to incredible stealth and cunning, nature’s most lethal predators have evolved a staggering array of hunting techniques.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: In this episode we witness nature’s most extraordinary animal migrations, and discover the lengths they must go to, in order to survive.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Baby Animals: Protecting babies against extreme conditions, hungry predators, and the threat of starvation, all animals must fight for the future of their species.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: The instinct to secure a mate is one of the most powerful that there is. From the beautiful to the bizarre, this episode explores the most amazing mating rituals from right across the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: This episode explores the world’s most toxic animals, revealing how poison and venom have given them the edge over the competition in their fight for survival.

programme.title: Battle Of Midway: The True Story
programme.desc: An inside look at the Battle of Midway, the aircraft used on both sides of the fight, and the dramatic story of one fighter pilot and his pivotal role in America’s first true victory of the Pacific War.

programme.title: Battle Of Okinawa In Color
programme.desc: Okinawa was the site of the last battle of the last great war of the 20th century, with a casualty rate in the tens of thousands. Through it all, military cameramen risked their lives to film the conflict, from brutal land combat to fierce kamikaze attacks at sea.

programme.title: Shuttle Discovery's Last Mission
programme.desc: Celebrate the remarkable past of the Discovery space shuttle before it embarks on its final flight. Witness the emotionally charged mission, and see if this robust but fragile aircraft makes it to Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: In West Virginia, the Wolfe brothers pick a century-old soda shop that's frozen in time. And a Methodist minister and circus ringleader opens the doors to his eye-popping collection.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Walt Disney overcomes immense obstacles to create the first theme park, where instead of thrill rides, he gives the visitor an immersive journey into a story, like the experience of being inside a movie.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: Coffee's quality and popularity wane by the 1960s, until a handful of visionaries turn the industry on its head. Three college friends create an iconic brand of revolutionary gourmet coffee.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek: Malaysia (S1)
programme.desc: Jaime goes back in time to explore old war relics in Kelantan. She tries her hand at Wau (kite-flying), songkat and batik-making. She also tours the city of Kota Bahru and eats a giant catfish.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek: Malaysia (S1)
programme.desc: Jaime explores historic Georgetown before heading to Batu Feringghi beaches to taste Assam Laksa. In Ipoh she drives a hybrid 4x4 Rainforest Challenger and heads to Fraser's Hill for a colonial experience.

programme.title: The Unbelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: Some of the world's most valiant figures overcome the most treacherous and downright bizarre circumstances. Like a man who survives the apocalypse, or a woman involved in three maritime disasters.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: In West Virginia, the Wolfe brothers pick a century-old soda shop that's frozen in time. And a Methodist minister and circus ringleader opens the doors to his eye-popping collection.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: Coffee's quality and popularity wane by the 1960s, until a handful of visionaries turn the industry on its head. Three college friends create an iconic brand of revolutionary gourmet coffee.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: Throughout the world, there are ancient structures that defy explanation. How were ancient civilisations able to build such extraordinary structures? And what purpose did they serve?

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: The Wolfe brothers tour a massive West Virginia homestead complete with an antique auto showroom. And in Texas, an ex-drag racer with a mountain of petroliana is in the mood to sell.

programme.title: Haze Hell Over Asia
programme.desc: As forest fires in Indonesia spread noxious smoke across the region, politicians and scientists must join forces to defeat one of Asia's worst environmental disasters.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Forget the monsters under your bed. The real ones, from dinosaurs to mythic beasts, are out there just waiting to be unearthed.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It is an ancient city, said to be overflowing with gold. Explorers put their lives on the line searching for it. As the endless quest to uncover this infamous city continues, will anyone ever find it?

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: A daring rocket and helicopter experiment results in the team witnessing a phenomenon that might prove an ancient legend about Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: In the 21st century, the search for extraterrestrial intelligence is ramping up with new technologies allowing us to explore stars across the universe. Are we on the verge of first contact?

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3)
programme.desc: \"King of the Swamp\" Troy Landry and Pickle Wheat mix it up with locals. Tes puts her skills to the test hunting without her partner Bill. Zak and Bruce return to Viper Alley, and Dusty hunts for a legend.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: A daring rocket and helicopter experiment results in the team witnessing a phenomenon that might prove an ancient legend about Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.desc: In the 21st century, the search for extraterrestrial intelligence is ramping up with new technologies allowing us to explore stars across the universe. Are we on the verge of first contact?

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S2 E20 - The Price
programme.desc: Xena, one of the fiercest, sexiest, most self-empowered women as she travels defending the innocent from the forces of darkness. She is the very definition of girl power.

programme.title: The Waltons S4 E06 - The Breakdown
programme.desc: As every member of the Walton family strives to follow his or her dreams during the hard years of the Depression, each finds the bonds of family -- which at times seem stifling -- to be their greatest source of strength in this heartwarming dramatic series about growing up in a rural Appalachian family.

programme.title: Frasier S5 E10 - Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: This season of FRASIER finds Niles and Frasier competing again, this time over who will find their father Martin the better birthday gift. Meanwhile, Daphne finds her favorite pub invaded by a familiar and unwelcome interloper.

programme.title: Bewitched S6 E11 - Darrin the Warlock
programme.desc: Another year of marriage between mortal and witch has the Stephens trying to cope with Samantha's meddling, magical family and their daughter's entrance into nursery school.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple S6 E04 - Greenshaw's Folly (Part 2)
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie perfectly captures Agatha Christie’s iconic amateur detective - and the innocent exterior which harbours a razor- sharp mind.

programme.title: Law \u0026 Order Special Victims Unit S11 E14 - Confidential
programme.desc: The Special Victims Unit, a specially trained squad of dedicated detectives in the NYPD, who investigate these vicious felonies. These are their stories.

programme.title: Married With Children S1 E02 - Thinergy
programme.desc: With offbeat humor and unflinching honesty, Married… With Children paints a more realistic picture of middle-class existence, warts and all for the less-than-lovable Bundys family.

programme.title: North And South Book I E01 - Episode 1 (Part 1)
programme.desc: 1842. Two West Point military academy cadets form a bond of friendship strong enough to survive the forces leading to the United States' Civil War--forces that will rip their country into North and South.

programme.title: North And South Book I E02 - Episode 1 (Part 2)
programme.desc: 1842. Two West Point military academy cadets form a bond of friendship strong enough to survive the forces leading to the United States' Civil War--forces that will rip their country into North and South.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple S6 E04 - Greenshaw's Folly (Part 2)
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie perfectly captures Agatha Christie’s iconic amateur detective - and the innocent exterior which harbours a razor- sharp mind.

programme.title: Roots: The Next Generations E10 - The Great Depression (Part 2)
programme.desc: The dramatization of Alex Haley's family line from post Civil War America to the writer's search for his roots.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S2 E21 - Lost Mariner
programme.desc: Xena, one of the fiercest, sexiest, most self-empowered women as she travels defending the innocent from the forces of darkness. She is the very definition of girl power.

programme.title: Frasier S5 E11 - Ain't Nobody's Business If I Do
programme.desc: This season of FRASIER finds Niles and Frasier competing again, this time over who will find their father Martin the better birthday gift. Meanwhile, Daphne finds her favorite pub invaded by a familiar and unwelcome interloper.

programme.title: Bewitched S6 E12 - Samantha's Double Mother Trouble
programme.desc: Another year of marriage between mortal and witch has the Stephens trying to cope with Samantha's meddling, magical family and their daughter's entrance into nursery school.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple S6 E05 - Endless Night (Part 1)
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie perfectly captures Agatha Christie’s iconic amateur detective - and the innocent exterior which harbours a razor- sharp mind.

programme.title: Marley \u0026 Me
programme.desc: A family learns important life lessons from their adorable, but naughty and neurotic, dog. Based on the memoir by John Grogan.

programme.title: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: A luckless taxi dancer in New York City seeks a better life and finds love along the way.

programme.title: Project A
programme.desc: Fighting against pirates at the turn of the 20th century, the Hong Kong navy are failing miserably. It's up to Sergeant Dragon Ma to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Guns Of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Gunslinger Chris Adams is hired by a Mexican revolutionary to organize the rescue of his cause's leader from a brutal Army prison.

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie
programme.desc: Elmer Bernstein's score highlights this story of two women who arrive in 1920s New York searching for work and romance.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: A rookie cop spends his first day as a Los Angeles narcotics officer with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears to be.

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: A Good Deal
programme.desc: Kidnapped by a desperate couple, businessman Burks Hill is forced on a frantic journey to Los Angeles. As danger mounts, the three travellers discover that they each harbour deadly secrets. What began as a simple kidnapping spirals into a lethal game where no one's plan will survive.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns the Monkey Muay Thai skills and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister who practices Chinese Kung Fu, suspects Neua is responsible for her sister's death but later uncovers that she was killed by an organized crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin ang wastong pagamit ng mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Discover what are percents, polygons, circles, solid figures, sequences, time, circumference, and how to solve simple equations.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Differentiate the various text-types and know how to summarize them, as well as how to make a stand and provide evidences supporting opinions or facts.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa mga pagbabago sa lipunan ng sinaunang Pilipino kabilang ang pagpupunyagi ng ilang pangkat na mapanatili ang kalayaan sa Kolonyalismong Espanyol at ang impluwensya nito sa kasalukuyan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about motion in terms of distance and time, alongside how objects and people interact and are affected by light, sound, and heat, and electricity. Discover the relationship of electricity and magnetism in electromagnets, and what simple DC circuits are.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 8 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of axiomatic structure of geometry and triangle congruence.

programme.title: Grade 8 English
programme.desc: Examine what are biases, propagandas, parallelism, and cohesive devices in different types of speech.

programme.title: Grade 8 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Aralin ang naging transpormasyon tungo sa makabagong panahon ng mga bansa at rehiyon sa daigdig bunsod ng paglaganap ng mga kaisipan sa agham, politika, at ekonomiya tungo sa pagbuo ng pandaigdigan kamalayan.

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. Discover how to identify a substance according to its atomic structure, and how to use the periodic table of elements to organize and determine the chemical properties of elements.

programme.title: Preschool | Eccd
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Kindergarten
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Grade 1 Language
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang konsepto ng pagbabaybay, panghalip, pangngalan, salitang naglalarawan, at ang pagtukoy ng sariling ideya at opinyon tungkol sa napakinggang kuwento.

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about fractions 1⁄2 and 1/4, 2-dimensional and 3-dimensional figures, as well as continuous and repeating patterns and mathematical sentences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading \u0026 Literacy
programme.desc: Learn about polite expressions and how to talk about oneself, one’s family and one’s personal experiences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Makabansa
programme.desc: Unawain ang kahalagahan ng pagkilala ng mga batayang impormasyon ng pisikal na kapaligiran sa sariling paaralan at ng mga taong bumubuo rito para sa paghubog ng kakayahan ng bawat mag-aaral.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent \"Fundue\" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programme.title: The Neighbors Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbor moves in, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbor committing murder. Unfortunately, nobody believes her.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jason has become a recluse because of a giant growth on the back of his neck. Marisa hates the red spider veins on her face, but is fearful of surgery because of previous problems.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighbourhood. Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: With growing interest in nature-friendly interiors, today's homes are all about nature-friendly elements. We’ll introduce you to the \"Smart House in Nature\" and the extraordinary \"Eco-Friendly Open House\".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Today, the final three contestants take part in a classic MasterChef challenge, the Time Auction. Beginning with 120 minutes, they will bid for their ingredients using time.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Janice and Bob have spent decades dreaming of leaving city life behind for a peaceful home by the sea. With their daughter Sarah guiding them, they are ready to turn their coastal dreams into reality.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork
programme.desc: Buddy heads to Chicago to one of the oldest buildings, the Berghoff, famous for their beer and schnitzel. Then he's off to Husk in Nashville, where this spot is putting a unique spin on Southern Classics.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Inspired by her friend Brian, Rachael shows how to make her version of a beef and chorizo chilli with queso that is the perfect meal for a holiday crowd, a big-match night or a family dinner.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: Betrayed By Love
programme.desc: Riley March's near-perfect life comes to a sudden halt when a car accident takes her life, leaving behind a family without a mother. As the investigation commences, the case takes a strange turn.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Inspired by her friend Brian, Rachael shows how to make her version of a beef and chorizo chilli with queso that is the perfect meal for a holiday crowd, a big-match night or a family dinner.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork
programme.desc: Buddy heads to Chicago to one of the oldest buildings, the Berghoff, famous for their beer and schnitzel. Then he's off to Husk in Nashville, where this spot is putting a unique spin on Southern Classics.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah prepares two dishes inspired by Chinese wontons: an all-American dish made with apple wontons and milk jam; and a collard green dumpling influenced by Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: The Neighbors Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbor moves in, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbor committing murder. Unfortunately, nobody believes her.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while...and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous! // When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence! SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. // Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the circus comes to town and steals his customers away, Mr. Krabs tries to sabotage the show.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The tiny futuristic city of Shmandor exacts revenge on Patrick Star. // Patrick and Squidina go on location to interview their neighbors.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: In this ad-packed variety episode, The Patrick Show sells merchandise in order to fund its second season.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf accidentally gives Baby Smurf a growth potion. He's now a giant and wreaks havoc in the village. // Gargamel gives Azrael supersonic ears. Suddenly, the Smurfs can't make a noise.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. // Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: With prankster Luan at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they're safe. That is, until they break down in front of an unusual motel. // The kids discover Dad isn't at his IT job anymore and is now a dishwasher.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. // Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom \u0026 Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and \"correct the record.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Will \u0026 Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy. // Squidward hits his head and reverts to being a baby, and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to take care of him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence! SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It’s Dad’s annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. // The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe discover that Lazlo Chance may be the evil Mastermind and enlist Chloe to help. But when Chloe is torn between her head and her heart, it threatens the entire mission.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Captain Man is being a baby about having a baby. Labor pains leave him helpless so Kid Danger and Piper step up to take on a couple of slick grease thieves.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly's biggest fan, Mandy, is invited onto the show as a one-girl studio audience. Mandy turns out to be more of a stalker than a fan and the kids have to get rid of her.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Sam \u0026 Cat
programme.desc: To boost their babysitting business, Sam and Cat make a commercial that features Dice's beloved dog. A family recognizes the dog and seeks legal ownership, claiming the dog belongs to them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After learning that Chunk was like her in high school, Luna worries her ambition to be a rocker is unrealistic. // When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. // Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.desc: Lincoln and friends try to befriend new girl Kara when they learn she has access to a legendary missing comic book. // Miguel enlists Leni's help when he launches his own perfume line at Reininger's.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time in her senior year.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.desc: Leni and Carlota's working styles clash when they are both interning for a famous fashion designer, Mariella Moss.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder happens, and the suspects get killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy over two generations.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents….

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder happens, and the suspects get killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy over two generations.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Hinukay Ko Na Ang Libingan Mo
Joe Reyes: Mahirap Patayin, Masamang Buhayin
SP01 Don Juan Da Dancing Policeman
Caught! (Season 2) S2 8
programme.desc: Officers in high-velocity situations need to make life-or-death decisions and put their lives in danger to protect and serve every day.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 9
programme.desc: See these incredible brushes with disaster, close calls and near-death events avoided by split-second decisions that change the course of fate.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 01
programme.desc: Gather 'round for a most hackful holiday celebration, as Brooke and Kevin demonstrate how to navigate any holiday office party like a pro Elf, and explain how the ball drop became a New Year's tradition.

programme.title: Impractical JokERs S2 2
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown. The guys try to sell diamonds to unsuspecting couples ready to tie the knot, and pose as members of a very unwelcoming committee down at the boardwalk.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 5
programme.desc: A rocket scientist, a social media guru and the Lebron James of Dodgeball compete for a final spot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 12
programme.desc: Michael tries new foods like shape-shifting pasta and never-ending soup! Then it's off to a vinyl shop for a record-breaking illusion, and later, Michael tries to convince his coworker to explore a new plant.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 13
programme.desc: At a wilderness store, Michael reels in customers with an amazing new fishing tool, and at an AT\u0026T store, Michael shows off a camera that's literally paper thin. Plus, a day of mini golf turns explosive when a loose cannon appears.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 5
programme.desc: Sheldon must decide how much \"Amy time\" is too much after she takes a job at his university. Meanwhile, Howard finds himself sleeping on Raj's couch after a fight with Bernadette.

programme.title: Friends S8 5
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn that Rachel is going on a date with a handsome actor.

programme.title: ER S1 12
programme.desc: Chloe plans to move to Texas with her boyfriend and have her baby. Carter struggles through his first surgery. Benton's sister insists they place their mother in a nursing home.New Year's Eve Episode.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 8
programme.desc: Officers in high-velocity situations need to make life-or-death decisions and put their lives in danger to protect and serve every day.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 5
programme.desc: A rocket scientist, a social media guru and the Lebron James of Dodgeball compete for a final spot.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S3 10
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori take a risk on a large covered item during an unusual auction. Will the reveal rev their profits or stall their cash flow? It's all determined in the biggest twist yet when their archrival wins a locker that puts the high-rolling couple in the palm of his hand.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S3 11
programme.desc: Buyers get stung when a locker unleashes a swarm of more than just merchandise. Then, when our buyers back away from a bin piled sky high with rusty office cabinets one hawk-eyed competitor sees something no one else does. And later, Jesse throws down to win antiques, but when the dust settles our winning bidder will discover a treasure trove of concealed cash.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 5
programme.desc: Sheldon must decide how much \"Amy time\" is too much after she takes a job at his university. Meanwhile, Howard finds himself sleeping on Raj's couch after a fight with Bernadette.

programme.title: Friends S8 5
programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn that Rachel is going on a date with a handsome actor.

programme.title: Smallville S2 18
programme.desc: After a schoolmate claims to be an alien and seemingly proves it by using heat vision, Clark begins to believe that the boy is from Krypton.

programme.title: Jack The Giant SlayER
programme.desc: Bryan Singer supersizes the \"Jack and the Beanstalk\" legend in this epic action twist on a classic tale, starring Nicholas Hoult, Stanley Tucci, Bill Nighy, Ewan McGregor, Ian McShane and more. When a young farmhand unwittingly opens a gateway between our world and a fearsome race of giants, an ancient war is reignited. Unleashed upon the Earth, the marauding giants strive to reclaim the land they once lost, forcing Jack into the battle of his life to stop them. Fighting for a kingdom and its people -- and the love of a princess, of course -- he comes face to face with the legendary goliaths and, in the process, become a legend himself.

programme.title: North By Northwest
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars as an innocent man mistaken for a spy in one of director Alfred Hitchcock's greatest thrillers. While leaving New York's Plaza Hotel, advertising executive Roger Thornhill (Grant) has the misfortune of standing just as the name \"George Kaplan\" is paged--starting a lethal case of mistaken identity and a nonstop game of cat and mouse as he is pursued across North America by espionage agents trying to kill him--and by police who suspect him of murder.

programme.title: Smallville S2 18
programme.desc: After a schoolmate claims to be an alien and seemingly proves it by using heat vision, Clark begins to believe that the boy is from Krypton.
